---
title: "Meet the Group"
listing:
  - id: pi
    include:
      people_group: "pi"
    template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image, education]
  - id: postdoc
    include:
      people_group: "postdoc"
    template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
    sort: last
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image, education]
  - id: gradstudent
    include:
      people_group: "gradstudent"
    template: ../_ejs/people-box.ejs
    sort: last
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image, education]
  - id: alumni
    include:
      people_group: "alumni"
    template: ../_ejs/alumni-box.ejs
    sort: last
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle, image, education, altsubtitle, alteducation]
page-layout: full
---

## Group Leader

::: {#pi}
:::

## Postdoctoral Fellows

::: {#postdoc}
:::

## Graduate Students

::: {#gradstudent}
:::

<!-- ## Alumni

::: {#alumni}
::: -->
